title: What A Loyal Cat!
description: This mod makes cats defend their owner from threats!
body:
Tired of your cats just sitting there while mobs smack you around? 😾
Not anymore! With What A Loyal Cat, your feline friends will jump into action, defending you from any mob that dares to attack their owner.

 

✨ Features:

Tamed cats will automatically fight back when you’re attacked.

Fully compatible with other pet mods.

Simple, lightweight, and works right out of the box.

This mod has been requested for YEARS across Reddit and Minecraft forums and it’s finally here! I spent 3 months bringing this to life (with a little AI help), and it was 100% worth it.

💡 Coming Soon: Fabric Version
